nodes.name: Fetch MLB Scores
nodes.notes: SETUP: Use the same 'Odds API' Query Auth credential created for Workflow 1.

nodes.name: Read Pending Games
nodes.notes: SETUP: Select your Google Sheet and 'Tracking' sheet. Filter reads rows where 'winner' column is empty.

nodes.name: Update Tracking Sheet
nodes.notes: SETUP: Select your Google Sheet and 'Tracking' sheet. Uses game_id as the match column to find the right row.

nodes.name: Send Telegram
nodes.notes: SETUP: Configure Telegram Bot credentials and set chatId
